mano_cua.result_summary: toData/fromData线宽还原测试通过。画2条不同粗细线条(minWidth:1/maxWidth:5粗线,minWidth:0.1/maxWidth:1细线),toData保存后clear清空,fromData加载后数据完全匹配(Data match:true),视觉上粗线和细线均正确还原。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Drew 2 strokes with different widths. toData saved 2 strokes with minWidth/maxWidth preserved. After clear+fromData, data matched exactly (Data match: true). Visual verification confirmed thick and thin lines restored correctly.
